text:

Author: jbeich

Log:
  MFH: r432012

  net-im/folks: ignore warnings in system headers

  Pass -isystem to avoid adding -Wno-foo each time Clang bumps into an
  issue with a header from another port.

  PR:		216031
  Approved by:	ports-secteam blanket
